ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays the total duration you have been staring on your vault (well at least when this plugin was able to measure it).
ast.target: 显示您凝视保险库的总时长（至少在本插件能够测量时）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The recorded staring time is shown as text, such as '10 hours'. Turning this off will show the total recorded time in HH:mm fashion.
ast.target: 记录的凝视时间以文本形式显示，例如“10小时”。关闭此选项将以 HH:mm 格式显示总记录时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overrides the status bar text displaying your staring time.
ast.target: 覆盖显示您凝视时间的状态栏文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overrides the status bar text displaying your total staring time for this vault.
ast.target: 覆盖显示您在此保险库中总凝视时间的状态栏文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overrides the status bar text shown when you disabled the staring time counting.
ast.target: 覆盖当您禁用凝视时间计数时显示的状态栏文本。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display total recorded staring time as human readable
ast.target: 以人类可读格式显示总记录凝视时间

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Status bar text of staring time
ast.target: 凝视时间的状态栏文本

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Status bar text of total staring time
ast.target: 总凝视时间的状态栏文本

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Status bar text when staring counter is paused
ast.target: 凝视计数器暂停时的状态栏文本

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: You have been staring at your vault for

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Your total staring time in this vault is
ast.target: 您在此保险库中的总凝视时间是

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 您的凝视计数器已暂停
